images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑influencer (age 20‑21), flawless yet natural skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, cute‑seductive face, fit‑curvy figure with a slim waist and ample chest, straight silky black hair cascading over shoulders. She wears a cropped, form‑fitting white varsity jacket with embroidered gold lettering over a sheer black lace top, the jacket’s smooth satin sleeves slipping slightly off the shoulders to reveal the delicate line of her clavicles and the subtle curve of her waist. Beneath the jacket she sports high‑waist denim shorts that hug her hips, a hint of the soft skin of her thighs visible. A playful wink plays on her lips as she looks directly into the camera, head tilted slightly, one hand resting on the jacket’s collar, the other gently tucking a strand of hair behind her ear. The scene is set in a luxurious hotel suite bathed in bright, dappled leaf‑light streaming through the floor‑to‑ceiling windows, the gentle bokeh revealing a backdrop of drifting cherry‑blossom petals and a soft city skyline. The lighting is clean and high‑key, soft highlights dancing across her skin, with no heavy shadows, achieving an ethereal, angelic atmosphere. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, and ray‑traced reflections, colour graded to the warm, soft tones of Kodak Portra 400 film.8k photo, Large breasts
